function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system, read finance schema and finance lane rulebook, then verified each matching invoice directly for exactness.
function.outcome_justification: The service line `follow-up timeline prototype review` appears in five invoices issued on 2025-10-28, 2025-11-25, 2025-12-23, 2026-02-08, and 2026-03-20 with line_eur values 240, 480, 240, 240, and 240 respectively; summed total is 1440.
